name: cognigy-mcp-server
description: Connect your AI assistant to Cognigy.AI — create, test, and improve LLM-based AI Agents through a self-improvement loop.
long_description:
A Model Context Protocol server that exposes the Cognigy.AI API through 9 high-level workflow tools focused on LLM-based AI Agents.

Create a complete AI Agent setup in one tool call (Agent + Flow + Job Node + Endpoint), then talk to it, evaluate responses, and iterate until it's perfect.

Supports: AI Agent management, knowledge stores, conversation history, flow management, analytics, and direct agent testing via REST endpoints.

cognigy_api_key.title: Cognigy API Key
cognigy_api_key.description: Your Cognigy API key (Cognigy.AI → User Menu → My Profile → API Keys)

tools.name: create_ai_agent
tools.description: Create a complete AI Agent with auto-provisioned flow, AI Agent Job Node, and REST endpoint

tools.name: update_ai_agent
tools.description: Update an AI Agent's configuration, persona, job description, and LLM settings

tools.name: setup_llm
tools.description: Create an LLM resource (GPT-4, Claude, etc.) in a project

tools.name: talk_to_agent
tools.description: Send a message to a Cognigy AI Agent and get its response

tools.name: manage_knowledge
tools.description: Create knowledge stores, add sources (URL, text, file), and list chunks

tools.name: create_tool
tools.description: Add a tool (knowledge, HTTP, MCP, email, custom) to an agent's job node

tools.name: update_tool
tools.description: Update an existing tool node's configuration

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List agents, flows, endpoints, LLMs, knowledge stores, tools, projects, and conversations

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Get details for a single resource by type and ID

tools.name: delete_resource
tools.description: Delete any resource by type and ID
